name: Mynatt Park
description: Mynatt Park is a place to play pickleball in Gatlinburg, TN. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Pickleball of the Smokies
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball of the Smokies in Sevierville, TN! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Pigeon Forge Community Center
description: Pigeon Forge Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pigeon Forge, TN. There are 8 wood and hard courts. 2 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $2 fee Monday thru Friday. $8 on Saturday. Outdoors courts: No Charge.

name: Pittman High School
description: Come play pickleball at Pittman High School in Gatlinburg, TN! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are private.

name: Sevierville City Park
description: 4 dedicated and 8 with permanent lines on tennis courts.

name: Sevierville Community Center
description: Sevierville Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sevierville, TN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
